meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with our expert guide on Claude Code skills setup. Learn to build production-ready SaaS MVPs using Antigravity and AI agents.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a senior engineer. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural patterns, and ships features directly to production, allowing you to focus on business logic rather than syntax errors.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a hundred open browser tabs—each one a 'beginner-friendly' tutorial that leaves you more confused than when you started. You’ve mastered the art of watching, but your GitHub remains empty. This is the silent killer of SaaS founders: the comfort of learning without the friction of building.

Today, we pivot. We are replacing passive consumption with aggressive, AI-assisted execution. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, we collapse the distance between an idea and a deployed feature. This isn't about learning to code; it’s about learning to build products that generate revenue.

steps.title: Initialize the Lean Project Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean, modular repository structure designed for rapid iteration. We avoid complex boilerplate in favor of a lean, AI-navigable architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal SaaS boilerplate structure using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Keep the directory tree flat and include a README that outlines the core business logic, not just installation steps.

steps.title: Configure the AI Agent Context
steps.description: Provide the AI with your 'Product Manifesto'. This ensures every line of code written aligns with your business goals and technical constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .claude-context file that defines our coding standards: mobile-first design, strict TypeScript usage, and a modular component pattern. Emphasize performance and readability.

steps.title: Implement Feature-Driven Development
steps.description: Stop worrying about global architecture. Build feature by feature, allowing the AI to handle the wiring and dependency injection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an authentication flow using Supabase Auth. Include a login page, a sign-up page, and a protected dashboard route. Ensure all error handling is user-friendly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "build the auth flow using the established context"

steps.title: Automate Unit and Integration Testing
steps.description: Trust is expensive. Use Claude to write tests as you build, ensuring your MVP doesn't break during future iterations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the recently created auth components and generate high-coverage Jest tests. Mock all Supabase interactions to ensure tests are fast and reliable.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Move from local development to a live URL. Feedback from real users is the only metric that matters.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration file that automates the environment variable injection and build process for our production environment.

pro_tips: Treat your .claude-context as a living document; update it whenever you change your tech stack to prevent hallucinations.
Use Claude Code to refactor legacy snippets into reusable hooks; never write the same logic twice.
Always ask the AI to explain its architectural decisions before it writes the code to ensure you maintain technical ownership.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' CLI to run iterative terminal commands that clean up your node_modules and build artifacts automatically.
When stuck, force the AI to 'critique' its own code; it often catches edge cases it missed during the initial generation.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is set up, identify your MVP's core 'Value Loop' and use this exact workflow to build the primary feature set over the next 48 hours.
content.conversion_block: Stop watching tutorials and start owning your market. You have the tools, the architecture, and the strategy to build a profitable SaaS. The only variable remaining is your execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
